description: Triggers for comparing multiple job offers including compensation, equity, and career factors

queries.query: Compare these two job offers I received and help me decide
Analyze my offer from Google vs the startup offer with equity
Help me evaluate three competing offers — which is best for my situation?
Calculate and compare total compensation for these two offers including RSUs
Is $180K base with 40K RSUs better than $200K base with no equity?
I have a public company offer and a startup offer — help me weigh the tradeoffs
Evaluate this offer: base, bonus, equity, benefits, location, growth potential
Which of these two offers is better for a risk-averse person with a mortgage?
Model the financial upside of this startup equity vs the public company offer
My FAANG offer vs my dream startup offer — help me make the decision
Negotiate a better salary for this job offer
Write my resume for a senior engineering role
Prepare me for the interview at this company
Research the market salary for a data scientist in San Francisco
Help me evaluate whether this company is a good fit for me culturally
What questions should I ask at the end of my interview?
Optimize my LinkedIn for job searching
Write a cover letter for this position
How do I ask for more time to decide on a job offer?
Build my reference list for these applications
